transformations.title: Modern Kitchen Transformation
transformations.description: From outdated and closed-off to bright, open, and luxury living with a finish that feels custom from every angle.
transformations.socialHook: This kitchen went from dated to custom luxury.
transformations.caption: A brighter layout, cleaner finishes, and a custom look changed the entire feel of this kitchen. This is what happens when every detail is designed with intention.

transformations.title: Custom Cabinetry Upgrade
transformations.description: A dated cabinet layout upgraded into a cleaner, sharper space with a more polished custom-built presence.
transformations.socialHook: Cabinetry can completely change the room.
transformations.caption: This upgrade gave the space a sharper, more refined presence. The result feels cleaner, more custom, and more aligned with a high-end home.

transformations.title: Statement Kitchen Refresh
transformations.description: A dramatic before-and-after that replaces ordinary finishes with a brighter, more elevated kitchen experience.
transformations.socialHook: A full kitchen refresh with instant impact.
transformations.caption: This transformation proves how much the right finish, layout, and visual balance can elevate a kitchen. The after feels brighter, more polished, and built to impress.

transformations.title: Premium Storage Transformation
transformations.description: A functional space reworked into a cleaner, more intentional design that looks organized, custom, and high-end.
transformations.socialHook: Storage, but make it look custom.
transformations.caption: Function matters, but presentation changes everything. This project turned a practical area into a cleaner, more intentional part of the home.

transformations.title: Luxury Built-In Moment
transformations.description: A plain area turned into a refined focal point with a richer finish, stronger lines, and a showroom-ready feel.
transformations.socialHook: From plain wall to luxury focal point.
transformations.caption: A built-in moment should feel like it belongs to the room. This upgrade added structure, warmth, and a premium focal point that changes the entire space.

transformations.title: Clean Modern Upgrade
transformations.description: A simple before becomes a polished custom result built for better flow, cleaner detail, and everyday impact.
transformations.socialHook: Clean lines. Better flow. Bigger impact.
transformations.caption: The goal was simple: make the space feel cleaner, sharper, and more intentional. The finished result gives the room a modern custom presence.

transformations.title: High-End Finish Reveal
transformations.description: The kind of transformation that changes the whole feel of the room: sharper, brighter, and instantly more expensive.
transformations.caption: This reveal is all about the final feel: brighter, sharper, and instantly more elevated. Details like this are what make a space feel expensive.
